articles.headline: France head coach Didier Deschamps says 'there's no revenge in football' ahead of Senegal rematch at FIFA World Cup
articles.description: France head coach Didier Deschamps insists that revenge for their 2002 loss to Senegal is not in his side's sights as they approach Tuesday's rematch at the FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Didier Deschamps [1296x729]
images.caption: Didier Deschamps directs traffic at France's training session ahead of their opening FIFA World Cup clash against Senegal.
images.credit: FRANCK FIFE / AFP via Getty Images

images.name: Onuoha praises Diomande's impact in Ivory Coast's win over Ecuador
images.caption: Onuoha praises Diomande's impact in Ivory Coast's win over Ecuador

articles.headline: World Cup Daily Live: Cape Verde hanging tough vs. heavily favored Spain
articles.description: Enjoy all the action from Monday's World Cup matches, with features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

images.name: Spain v Cape Verde Pedri Kevin Pina [1296x729]
Moreno: Signing Cucurella would make sense for Real Madrid
images.caption: Moreno: Signing Cucurella would make sense for Real Madrid

articles.headline: Where must the Netherlands improve after Japan draw?

images.name: Where must the Netherlands improve after Japan draw?

articles.headline: Senegal's Nicolas Jackson must use the FIFA World Cup to impress Chelsea, and Xabi Alonso
articles.description: Senegal striker Nicolas Jackson may actually fit new Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso's vision for strikers better than many may initially assume. The FIFA World Cup is a chance to prove that.

images.name: Nicolas Jackson [1296x729]
images.caption: Nicolas Jackson was neither here nor there with Bayern Munich while on loan, and can use the World Cup with Senegal to really up his stocks with new Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso.
images.credit: Cory Knowlton/ISI Photos/ISI Photos via Getty Images

images.name: Chelsea's Nicolas Jackson [1296x729]
images.caption: Nicolas Jackson's time with Chelsea has been largely disappointing for all concerned, but he is an Alonso striker more than most would think.

images.name: Marcotti: Chelsea missing out on Europe is a blessing for Alonso
images.caption: Gab Marcotti explains why Chelsea missing out on a European spot could benefit Xabi Alonso.

articles.headline: Every team's championship, group odds for the 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Odds for all 48 teams to advance from their group through the knockout stage and to win the 2026 World Cup.

images.name: Felix Nmecha [576x324]
images.caption: Felix Nmecha and Germany open strong against Curacao.
images.alt: Felix Nmecha #23 of Germany celebrates his goal by pretending to take off his crown during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match.

images.name: Vinicius Jr. [1296x729]
images.caption: With a 1-1 draw, Brazil saw their odds to win the World Cup lengthen from +950 to 11-1.
images.alt: Vinicius Junior of Brazil runs with the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 13, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
images.credit: Shaun Botterill - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Yamale for WC Odds file (260529) [1296x729]
images.caption: Spain's World Cup fortunes are tied to the health of Lamine Yamal's left leg.
images.alt: Spain's Lamine Yamal, right, scores his side third goal during the UEFA Nations League quarterfinal second leg match between the Netherlands and Spain at Mestalla stadium in Valencia, Spain, Sunday, March 23, 2025.

images.name: Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappe and France are looking to win their third World Cup.

articles.headline: Why is Sabri Lamouchi set for Tunisia departure?
articles.description: Why is Sabri Lamouchi set for Tunisia departure?

images.name: Why is Sabri Lamouchi set for Tunisia departure?
images.caption: Why is Sabri Lamouchi set for Tunisia departure?

article.headline: Aleksandar  Kolarov free kick gives Serbia win over Costa Rica
article.description: Superb strike enough for 1-0 win over Costa Rica in scrappy match at the Samara Arena.
article.linkText: Kolarov free kick gives Serbia victory

competitions.altGameNote: FIFA World Cup, FIFA World Cup

keyEvents.text: Francisco Calvo (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Costa Rica 0, Serbia 0.
Second Half begins Costa Rica 0, Serbia 0.
David Guzmán (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Costa Rica 0, Serbia 1. Aleksandar Kolarov (Serbia) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Branislav Ivanovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Christian Bolaños replaces Johan Venegas.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Joel Campbell replaces Marco Ureña.
Substitution, Serbia. Filip Kostic replaces Adem Ljajic.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Daniel Colindres replaces David Guzmán.
Substitution, Serbia. Antonio Rukavina replaces Dusan Tadic.
Substitution, Serbia. Aleksandar Prijovic replaces Aleksandar Mitrovic.
VAR Decision: Card upgraded Filip Kostic (Serbia).
Aleksandar Prijovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Costa Rica 0, Serbia 1.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Corner,Serbia. Conceded by Johnny Acosta.
Attempt blocked. Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Adem Ljajic with a cross.
Foul by Dusan Tadic (Serbia).
Johnny Acosta (Costa Rica) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt saved. Marco Ureña (Costa Rica) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is saved in the bottom right corner by Vladimir Stojkovic (Serbia). Assisted by Bryan Ruiz with a through ball.
Corner,Costa Rica. Conceded by Vladimir Stojkovic.
Attempt saved. Giancarlo González (Costa Rica) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Vladimir Stojkovic (Serbia). Assisted by Óscar Duarte with a cross.

Attempt missed. Giancarlo González (Costa Rica) header from the right side of the six yard box is too high. Assisted by David Guzmán with a cross following a corner.
